requirement_topic.en: Cell Safety — NTC Adoption of IEC 62133
requirement_topic.zh: 电芯安全——NTC 对 IEC 62133 的采用
requirement_topic.zht: 電芯安全——NTC 對 IEC 62133 的採用

summary.en: Colombia expects lithium batteries and power banks to be supported by destination-facing technical evidence based on applicable ICONTEC NTC standards aligned to IEC requirements, including cell safety concepts from IEC 62133 and related thermal, overcurrent, and abnormal-condition expectations for lithium chemistry products used in consumer and portable devices.
summary.zh: 哥伦比亚要求锂电池与移动电源提交基于 ICONTEC NTC 与 IEC 对应要求的目标市场技术证据，通常覆盖 IEC 62133 的电芯安全逻辑，包括热管理、过电流和异常工况下的保护表现，适用于消费类和便携式设备。
summary.zht: 哥倫比亞要求鋰電池與行動電源提交基於 ICONTEC NTC 與 IEC 對應要求的目標市場技術證據，通常涵蓋 IEC 62133 的電芯安全邏輯，包括熱管理、過電流及異常工況下保護表現，適用於消費及便攜式設備。

standards_or_laws: ICONTEC NTC standards that adopt IEC battery safety requirements
IEC 62133 series technical expectations for lithium cells and packs where referenced
ONAC acceptance file requirements in the destination technical review

summary.en: China uses GB / GB T battery test expectations and documentation models and may require CCC for affected categories, but these are domestic-compliance frameworks and are not mandatory substitutes for the Colombia NTC/IEC-targeted destination package.
summary.zh: 中国采用 GB/GBT 电池测试和文件体系，部分品类还涉及 CCC，但其定位是国内合规框架，不可替代面向哥伦比亚的 NTC/IEC 目标市场技术包。
summary.zht: 中國採用 GB/GBT 電池測試及文件體系，部分品類還涉及 CCC，但其定位為國內合規框架，不可替代面向哥倫比亞之 NTC/IEC 目標市場技術包。

standards_or_laws: GB / GB T safety and performance standards for lithium cells and packs
China Compulsory Certification (CCC) where category coverage applies

gap.en: Chinese reports are useful technical inputs, but Colombian market review may require re-scope and localization into NTC-aligned evidence with importer-signed documentation. No blanket equivalence exists between GB/GBT and Colombian technical acceptance.
gap.zh: 中国测试报告可作为有价值技术输入，但哥伦比亚市场通常需要按 NTC 对齐重定范围并由进口方确认文件链。GB/GBT 与哥伦比亚技术接受之间不存在普适等同关系。
gap.zht: 中國測試報告可作為有價值之技術輸入，但哥倫比亞市場通常需按 NTC 對齊重定範圍並由進口方確認文件鏈。GB/GBT 與哥倫比亞技術接受之間不存在普適等同關係。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where safety documentation is requested by ONAC pathway or by market acceptance workflow for the specific model and chemistry.
mandatory_status.cn: GB / GB T and CCC are mandatory in Chinese domestic/commercial contexts where applicable; they do not by themselves satisfy Colombia entry conditions.

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Colombia has no EU-style blanket battery regulation that replaces this route; treat IEC-aligned evidence as destination-specific and map it against NTC references before clearance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 哥伦比亚没有可取代该流程的欧盟式统一电池法规；应将 IEC 对齐证据目标化为哥伦比亚场景并映射至 NTC 引用后再用于准入。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 哥倫比亞沒有可取代該流程的歐盟式統一電池法規；應將 IEC 對齊證據目標化為哥倫比亞場景並映射至 NTC 引用後再用於准入。
